---
title: "CV"
filters:
  - bold-my-name.lua
format:
    quarto-cv-pdf: 
    template: latex-templates/mytemplate.tex
author: Frederick Boehm
date: last-modified
phone: 715-252-3929
address: "University of Michigan · 419 Waymarket DR · Ann Arbor, MI 48103 · USA"
email: frederick.boehm@gmail.com
fontsize: 11pt
github: fboehm # github account
orcid: 0000-0002-1644-5931 # orcid identifier
#osf: ymqui # osf five character id
#twitter: twitter # twitter handle
web: fboehm.us
fontawesome: yes
nocite: '@*'
bibliography: 
  peer: parsing-bib-files/boehm-article.bib
  collection: parsing-bib-files/boehm-incollection.bib
  software: parsing-bib-files/boehm-software.bib
  submitted: parsing-bib-files/boehm-unpublished.bib
  book: parsing-bib-files/boehm-book.bib
  misc: parsing-bib-files/boehm-misc.bib
  proceedings: parsing-bib-files/boehm-inproceedings.bib
validate-yaml: false
csl: chicago-fullnote-bibliography-boehm.csl
engine: knitr
---






# Education



:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

**University of Michigan**  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Internal Medicine (NIH T32 training grant)  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Biostatistics  

**University of Massachusetts Medical School**  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Microbiology & Physiological Systems  

**University of Wisconsin-Madison**  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Biostatistics and Medical Informatics  
Ph.D., Department of Statistics  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Molecular and Environmental Toxicology Center  
Assistant Researcher, Value-Added Research Center   


**University of Washington**  
Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Department of Biostatistics  

**University of Wisconsin-Madison**  
M.D., School of Medicine and Public Health  
M.S., Department of Population Health Sciences  
B.S., with Honors in Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biochemistry, College of Letters and Science  
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
Ann Arbor, Michigan, USA    
2023 to present    
2021 to 2023    

Worcester, Massachusetts, USA    
2019 to 2021  

Madison, Wisconsin, USA    
2019  
2011 to 2019  
2012 to 2014    
2011  


Seattle, Washington, USA  
2007 to 2009  

Madison, Wisconsin, USA  
2003 to 2007  
2003 to 2007  
1996 to 2001  

:::

::::


# Submitted Manuscripts

::: {#refs-submitted}
:::

# Journal Articles

::: {#refs-peer}
:::

# Book

::: {#refs-book}
:::

# Book Chapters

::: {#refs-collection}
:::

# Software

::: {#refs-software}
:::

# Conference Proceedings

::: {#refs-proceedings}
:::




# Other Publications

::: {#refs-misc}
:::


# Teaching Experience

## Formal Courses

The College Classroom: Teaching Inclusively
Title: Instructor
Term: Fall 2017
Institution: CIRTL Network
Course: The College Classroom: How to teach inclusively for educating a diverse nation
Title: Co-facilitator
Term: Spring 2017
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison
Course: Statistics 371: Introductory statistics for biologists
Title: Lecturer student assistant (Instructor of record)
Term: Fall 2016
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison
Course: Statistics 679: Data science
Title: Guest lecturer on topic models
Term: Fall 2016
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison
Course: Statistics 679: Data science
Title: Teaching assistant
Term: Fall 2016
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison
Course: Statistics 224 & 324: Introductory statistics for engineers
Title: Lecturer student assistant (Instructor of record)
Term: Spring 2014, Fall 2014, Spring 2015, Fall 2015, Spring 2016
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison
Course: Statistics 301 & 371: Introductory statistics
Title: Lecturer student assistant (Instructor of record)
Term: Summer 2015
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison
Course: Biostatistics 518: Introduction to biostatistics
Title: Teaching assistant
Frederick Boehm 6
Term: Winter 2010
Institution: University of Washington
Course: Biostatistics 517: Introduction to biostatistics
Title: Teaching assistant
Term: Fall 2009
Institution: University of Washington
Course: Biostatistics 511
Title: Teaching assistant
Term: Summer 2008
Institution: University of Washington
Course: Chemistry 3B: Introductory organic chemistry
Title: Graduate student instructor
Term: Fall 2001
Institution: University of California-Berkeley


## Short Courses & Workshops

Engaging students in the teaching of statistics (twice)
Title: Instructor
Dates: July 2020 to August 2020 & March 2018 to April 2018
Institution: Center for the Integration of Research, Teaching and Learning Network (https://cirtl.net/)


Short Course: Data analysis with topic models for communications researchers (twice)
Title: Instructor
Dates: October 2016 & July 2016  
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison  


Data Carpentry Workshop (twice)
Title: Instructor
Dates: June 19-20, 2017 (Madison, Wisconsin) & Sept 15-16, 2018 (Rolla, Missouri)  
Website: https://uw-madison-aci.github.io/2017-06-19-uwmadison-dc/

Short course: Topic modeling for non-statisticians
Title: Instructor
Dates: October 2013
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison

Short course: Statistical computing with R
Title: Instructor
Dates: June & July 2013; June & July 2012
Institution: University of Wisconsin-Madison  

## Training in Teaching  



# Mentoring Experience

Research mentor to Robert Turner, Undergraduate researcher  
Project: Topic Modeling of Tweets to Detect Events  
Dates: May 2015 to May 2016  
Next position: Software Engineer at Epic Systems


Research mentor to Jinyu Xia, Undergraduate researcher  
Project: Tweet Sentiments Associate with Stock Market Trends  
Dates: September 2015 to August 2016  
Next Position: Graduate student at University of Washington (Department of Statistics)  


# Awards & Honors




# Talks and Presentations

# Service

## University Service

## Community Service

## Professional Service
